_doc: VP regression test cases. Each case has shape data that feeds into VP check functions. type: true_positive = should detect, false_positive = should NOT detect. status: 'known_issue' = code doesn't match desired behavior (tracked for future fix), 'verified' = code matches expectation (default). Shape coordinates use pt values — the runner converts to EMU.

cases.source: synthetic — shape extends beyond right edge
cases.description: Shape x+w exceeds slide width (720pt) + tolerance (2.83pt). Right edge at 750pt vs slide 720pt.

cases.source: synthetic — shape extends beyond bottom edge
cases.description: Shape y+h exceeds slide height (405pt) + tolerance. Bottom at 430pt vs slide 405pt.

cases.source: synthetic — shape extends beyond left edge (negative x)
cases.description: Shape x = -5pt, beyond -COL_TOLERANCE (-2.83pt). Negative x overflow is WARN level.

cases.source: synthetic — shape within tolerance of right edge
cases.description: Shape x+w = 722pt, within COL_TOLERANCE (2.83pt) of slideW 720pt. Should not trigger.

cases.source: synthetic — zero-size placeholder
cases.description: Zero-size shape at negative position. Skipped due to w=0 && h=0 check.

cases.source: synthetic — column shapes with inconsistent widths
cases.description: 4 shapes at similar x (~100pt), different y, with width variance > 5pt (63500 EMU). Widths: 200, 200, 210, 200pt. Max-min = 10pt > 5pt threshold.

cases.source: synthetic — column shapes with consistent widths
cases.description: 4 shapes at same x, widths within 5pt tolerance (200, 201, 202, 200). Max-min = 2pt < 5pt. And x spread = 2pt < COL_TOLERANCE.

cases.source: synthetic — only 2 shapes in column (below 3-shape threshold)
cases.description: Only 2 shapes at similar x — below the 3-shape minimum for column check.

cases.source: synthetic — shape with txBody but empty text runs
cases.description: Shape has hasTxBody=true but textRuns are all empty. No fill, no overlapping text sibling to suppress.

cases.source: synthetic — fill shape with empty text but overlapping text sibling (html2pptx pattern)
cases.description: Fill shape with empty txBody has an overlapping text sibling — suppressed by the sibling check.

cases.source: synthetic — white text on white fill (invisible)
cases.description: White text (#FFFFFF) on white fill (#FFFFFF) — contrast ratio 1.0:1, below 1.5 ERROR threshold.

cases.source: synthetic — low contrast text (gray on light gray)
cases.description: Light gray text (#AAAAAA) on white fill — contrast ~2.3:1, between 1.5 and 4.5 WARN range.

cases.source: synthetic — high contrast text (black on white)
cases.description: Black text (#000000) on white fill (#FFFFFF) — contrast 21:1, well above 4.5 threshold.

cases.source: synthetic — table with empty data cell
cases.description: 3×2 table with one empty cell in data row — triggers WARN.

cases.source: synthetic — table with entirely empty data row
cases.description: Table with one data row where all non-merged cells are empty — triggers ERROR for entire empty row.

cases.source: synthetic — table with all data cells filled
cases.description: All data cells have text — no empty cell issues.

cases.source: synthetic — table with mismatched column counts
cases.description: Header has 3 columns, data row has 2 — column count mismatch ERROR.

cases.source: synthetic — table with >50% empty data cells
cases.description: Table with 4 data cells, 3 empty (75%) — exceeds 50% threshold for ERROR.

cases.source: synthetic — consistent table with all columns matching
cases.description: Header and all data rows have same column count. Less than 50% empty.

cases.source: synthetic — shape grid with mixed text/no-text cells (>40% empty → ERROR)
cases.description: 8 filled shapes in 2×4 grid pattern. 4 have text, 4 don't — 50% empty > 40% threshold → ERROR. Also per-column WARN for individual cells.

cases.source: synthetic — fewer than 6 filled shapes (below threshold)
cases.description: Only 4 filled shapes — below the 6-shape minimum for grid detection.

cases._comment: === VP-08: Fill shape with no text (empty card) ===
cases.source: synthetic — large filled shape with no text and no overlapping text sibling
cases.description: Shape 100×80pt with fill #1B2A4A, no text runs. Area > 50pt×50pt threshold. No overlapping text sibling.

cases.source: synthetic — filled shape with overlapping text sibling (html2pptx bg+text pattern)
cases.description: Fill shape has an overlapping text sibling — suppressed by the sibling check.

cases.source: synthetic — small filled shape below area threshold
cases.description: Shape 30×30pt with fill — area < 50pt×50pt threshold, not flagged.

cases.source: synthetic — long text in small shape exceeds 1.5× height
cases.description: 200-char text in 200pt×30pt shape. At 7pt avg char width: 200/28.5 chars per line ≈ 7 lines. 7×16pt = 112pt needed, shape 30pt available. 112 > 30×1.5=45 → WARN.

textRuns.text: Lorem ipsum dolor sit amet, consectetur adipiscing elit. Sed do eiusmod tempor incididunt ut labore et dolore magna aliqua. Ut enim ad minim veniam, quis nostrud exercitation ullamco laboris nisi ut aliq

cases.source: synthetic — short text fitting easily in shape
cases.description: 20-char text in 300pt×60pt shape. 300/7≈42 chars per line → 1 line. 16pt < 60×1.5=90pt. No density issue.

cases.source: synthetic — row with inconsistent gaps between shapes
cases.description: 4 shapes in same row (similar y). Gaps: 10pt, 50pt, 10pt. StdDev ≈ 18.9pt > 5pt threshold.

cases.source: synthetic — row with consistent gaps
cases.description: 4 shapes in same row with equal 20pt gaps. StdDev = 0 < 5pt.

cases._comment: === VP-11: Reading order vs visual order ===
cases.source: synthetic — XML order reversed from visual (y→x) order
cases.description: 4 text shapes in reversed XML order vs visual order. All 4 mismatched = 100% > 30% threshold.

cases.source: synthetic — XML order matches visual order
cases.description: 4 text shapes in correct visual order (top-to-bottom). 0 mismatches.

cases.source: synthetic — slide with only 1 shape
cases.description: Slide with only 1 shape total (0 tables) — below 2-shape threshold → ERROR.

cases.source: synthetic — slide with shapes but no text anywhere
cases.description: 3 shapes but none have text, no table text either → ERROR.

cases.source: synthetic — slide with adequate shapes and text
cases.description: 3 shapes, at least one has text → passes both checks.

cases.source: synthetic — single media file > 5MB
cases.description: Single media file of 6MB exceeds the 5MB per-file threshold.

cases.source: synthetic — total media > 20MB
cases.description: 5 media files at 4.5MB each = 22.5MB total, exceeding 20MB total threshold.

cases.source: synthetic — all media files under thresholds
cases.description: 3 files at 1MB each — under 5MB per file and 20MB total.

cases.source: payroll-guide slide-05 퇴직충당금 행 미세 겹침
cases.description: Two independent text shapes overlap 12% — real layout problem from text wrapping in adjacent table rows

cases.source: payroll-v2 slides 5,7,12,35 — html2pptx grid cell bg+text split
cases.description: html2pptx creates separate fill shape (no text) and text shape (no fill) for grid cells — 100% overlap is intentional

cases.source: synthetic — bg shape overlaps independent text from adjacent column
cases.description: A fill-only shape from col 1 overlaps a text-only shape from col 2 — NOT siblings, real overlap ≥20%
cases._known_issue: VP-14 bg+text sibling skip cannot distinguish same-cell pairs from cross-column pairs. Needs position-matching heuristic to fix.

cases.source: payroll-v2 — parent container fully contains child text
cases.description: Parent shape fully contains child — caught by containment check, not bg+text skip

cases.source: synthetic — picture rendered on top of text shape (z-order reversal)
cases.description: Picture at xmlOrder=5 overlaps text shape at xmlOrder=3. Overlap 50% of picture area. Picture is ON TOP → hides text.

cases.source: synthetic — picture behind text (correct z-order)
cases.description: Picture at xmlOrder=1 is behind text at xmlOrder=3. This is the correct order — picture as background.

cases.source: synthetic — picture on top but overlap < 10%
cases.description: Picture overlaps text but only 5% of picture area — below 10% threshold.

cases.source: payroll-v2 slide-18 — key-point text overflow
cases.description: 14pt CJK text in 370pt-wide shape — ratio 1.09 (>0.95, <1.2) correctly triggers WARN
cases._note: Originally expected ERROR, but ratio=1.09 is below the 1.2 threshold for ERROR. WARN is the correct detection level.

shape.text: '고정성' 요건 폐기 → 재직 조건부 상여금도 통상임금 포함

cases.source: payroll-v2 slides 1,8,20,22,25,27,28 — short text in badges/labels
cases.description: Short CJK text (≤5 chars) like '국민연금' in small shapes — PPTX shrink-to-fit handles it
cases._known_issue: VP-16 ratio>0.95 branch doesn't check isShortText. 4-char text in 53pt shape hits 1.02 ratio → WARN. Should be excluded for short badge text.

cases.source: synthetic — 10pt table cell with 2-line CJK overflow
cases.description: 10pt CJK in 80pt-wide, 22pt-tall cell — wraps to 3 lines but shape too short

cases.source: payroll-v2 — wide text fills 95-100% but doesn't overflow
cases.description: Text fills 96% width — may wrap but fits vertically in tall enough shape
cases._known_issue: VP-16 ratio>0.95 triggers WARN for 9-char text in 103pt shape (ratio=1.06). Shape is tall enough (40pt) for 2 lines — no real overflow. Needs height check in 0.95 branch.
